title: Separate autoCompact hook from pipeline (parity with CC autoCompact.ts)
description:
## Goal
Add a dedicated autoCompact trigger/hook module matching CC services/compact/autoCompact.ts (~351 lines).

## CC behaviors missing from OC
- getAutoCompactThreshold(model): effectiveWindow minus 13_000 buffer (not a 90% ratio)
- CLAUDE_AUTOCOMPACT_PCT_OVERRIDE env var override
- DISABLE_AUTO_COMPACT and DISABLE_COMPACT env kill-switches
- autoCompactEnabled user config flag
- calculateTokenWarningState(): percentLeft, isAboveWarningThreshold/ErrorThreshold/AutoCompactThreshold, isAtBlockingLimit
- shouldAutoCompact(): recursion guard (session_memory/compact sources return false), circuit-breaker flag checks
- autoCompactIfNeeded(): circuit breaker at 3 consecutive failures, sessionMemoryCompaction tried first, full compactConversation fallback, resets lastSummarizedMessageId on success
- AutoCompactTrackingState: compacted, turnCounter, turnId, consecutiveFailures

## OC counterpart
compaction.rs check_context_budget() (lines 713-725) uses a simpler 85/90% threshold pair with no buffer-based tuning, no circuit breaker, no env overrides, no user config flag.

## Parent
#523. Phase 1 spec tracked in #534.
